title: Rei LCL Tumbler Glass
wikitext:
[]: Rei LCL Tumbler Glass             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Tue Sep 21, 2010 9:45 am I have a humble request, though I doubt anyone can help me as I've scoured the Interwebs trying to find it. When I was in Japan two years ago I picked up something I've wanted for a very long time, the Rei in LCL tumbler glass. However when I got home my best friend, who is a huge Rei fan (and I am Asuka) was really jealous. I felt like a jerk not getting him one, it just didn't dawn on me that he would want it as well. Anyway, I've been trying to track one down since then, but they are nearly impossible to find. The Eva store lists them but have been out of stock forever. So I was just curious if anyone knew of a place selling them or had an extra one to sell.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue Sep 21, 2010 11:04 am Have you tried eBay? Risky/costly maybe but there's an offhand chance someone could be selling one of them.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 21, 2010 11:30 am soul.assassin wrote: Have you tried eBay?

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Tue Sep 21, 2010 11:41 am I bought one when I was in Japan and use it all the time... really should have bought more than one in case of breakages, If anyone notices any up for sale I'm also interested in a spare or two :P

[]:             Quote Post by MJHx » Wed Sep 22, 2010 10:20 am giuliano wrote: I bought one when I was in Japan and use it all the time... really should have bought more than one in case of breakages, If anyone notices any up for sale I'm also interested in a spare or two :P
